message:
fix(sqlite): allow savepoints in Write authorizer policy for batch operations

The SQLite connector's batch operation uses SAVEPOINT/RELEASE for atomicity,
but the authorizer hook was denying Savepoint actions under the Write policy.
This caused all sqlite.batch invocations to fail with "statement denied by
the SQLite safety policy". Separate Transaction (still denied) from Savepoint
(now allowed under Write only) to fix batch while maintaining transaction
control restrictions.

br-knqyl
